title: Cross-view identity mapping
goal: Connect ecosystem map nodes to Leitstand Anatomy, Timeline, Insights, Reflexion, and Ops views only through deterministic IDs and explicit degraded states.

acceptance.assertion: Map node IDs are resolved through a deterministic mapping contract rather than label heuristics.
Unknown or unmapped IDs are shown as degraded or unlinked, not guessed.
Cross-view links navigate within read-only views and do not trigger tasks or external mutations.

validation.focused_view_and_controller_tests: 37 passed across 5 files on current Leitstand head
validation.live_service: leitstand.service active/running, NRestarts=0, exact release commit 4218e10ab4ea9dc029c98009f4f142c7bbcc81eb

metadata.outcome: Implemented through Leitstand PR #146 and retained on current production main.

verified_acceptance.stable-id-map: src/controllers/ecosystemMapLinks.ts loads a versioned nodeId mapping contract; src/controllers/ecosystemMapNavigation.ts derives navigation from stable Mermaid node IDs instead of label heuristics.
verified_acceptance.unknown-id-degraded: resolveEcosystemCrossLink returns an explicit unmapped state, and navigation falls back to the exact commit-bound Systemkatalog definition line instead of guessing a Leitstand view.
verified_acceptance.links-preserve-boundary: The contract accepts only local read-only Leitstand hrefs; the map exposes navigation only and contains no task, repair, merge or external mutation path.
